root_causes.title: Repeated filesystem/parse passes in lint and index
root_causes.description: lint_wiki and update_index do repeated os.stat calls via `pathlib.Path.resolve()`, `exists()`, and full file reading instead of targeted extraction.
root_causes.solution_summary: Optimize `lint_wiki` by resolving paths once and using `is_relative_to()`. Optimize `update_index` to extract frontmatter with regex to avoid parsing full files.

root_causes.title: Unnecessary persist_query index rebuilds
root_causes.description: persist_query calls `_update_index_if_changed` unconditionally after analysis logic.
root_causes.solution_summary: Only regenerate index if `analysis_changed` is true.

root_causes.title: Duplicate workflow YAML parsing in CI-2
root_causes.description: CI-2 workflow parses YAML via `ruby -e 'require "psych"; ...'` and `test_workflow_yaml_syntax.py` does the exact same thing.
root_causes.solution_summary: Remove the inline Ruby step from `ci-2-analyst-diagnostics.yml` and rely on `test_workflow_yaml_syntax.py`.

root_causes.title: Batch CI-3 ingest and simplify GITHUB_OUTPUT handoff
root_causes.description: CI-3 processes files one by one with a shell loop, and pushes a large list through GITHUB_OUTPUT.
root_causes.solution_summary: Use `--sources-manifest` via file to process all sources in batch.

root_causes.title: Write paths follow symlinks out of bounds
root_causes.description: Filesystem operations in python scripts do not check for symlinks resolving out of repo root.
root_causes.solution_summary: Add `safe_write` and `safe_move` to `write_utils.py` checking `path.resolve().is_relative_to()` and use them across all write paths.

root_causes.title: Enforce authoritative approval in CI-3
root_causes.description: CI-3 manual dispatch has `maintainer_approved` boolean but no environment check on the `preflight` job.
root_causes.solution_summary: Move environment `ci3-manual-approval` into `preflight` job or add actor checks.

root_causes.title: Remove manual lock-file deletion in CI-3
Deprecate --result-json and hardcode contradiction
root_causes.description: `--result-json` is a no-op flag, `--has-unresolved-contradiction` exposes internal logic.
root_causes.solution_summary: Remove both flags, update `_build_parser` and remove tests referencing them.

root_causes.title: Close test coverage gaps
root_causes.description: Missing tests for verification-matrix items and missing CI step to assert coverage >= 90%.
root_causes.solution_summary: Add tests for missing verification matrix items. Add a step in `ci-2-analyst-diagnostics.yml` to measure coverage.

root_causes.title: Resolve spec drift for entity/concept generation
root_causes.description: Ingest writes source pages but docs claim it generates entities and concepts.
root_causes.solution_summary: Update SPEC.md and architecture.md to remove claims that ingest generates entities and concepts.

root_causes.title: Use real revision SHA in ingest SourceRef
root_causes.description: Ingest uses a hardcoded SHA for `SourceRef` creation.
root_causes.solution_summary: Read GITHUB_SHA from env or use git rev-parse HEAD to fetch a real SHA.

root_causes.title: update_index --write does not acquire lock
root_causes.solution_summary: Use `exclusive_write_lock` from `write_utils.py` around the file writing logic in `update_index.py`.

root_causes.title: Add performance instrumentation to automation
root_causes.solution_summary: Add `time` commands to key steps in CI-2 and CI-3 workflows, fail if over budget.

tasks.title: Optimize lint_wiki and update_index repeated filesystem/parse passes
tasks.prompt: Optimize `lint_wiki.py` to avoid redundant `.resolve()` in `_resolve_internal_markdown_target` loop. Optimize `update_index.py` `_extract_frontmatter` to use `re.DOTALL` and avoid evaluating the entire file via `splitlines()` for large files. In `scripts/kb/update_index.py`, when `--write` is passed, wrap the file write operation inside `write_utils.exclusive_write_lock('.')`.

tasks.title: Skip persist_query index rebuild when analysis output is unchanged
tasks.prompt: In `scripts/kb/persist_query.py`, inside `_execute`, ensure `index_updated = _update_index_if_changed(request.wiki_root)` is only called if `analysis_changed` is true. Remove `--result-json` and `--has-unresolved-contradiction` from `scripts/kb/persist_query.py`. Hardcode contradiction logic if needed.

tasks.title: Eliminate duplicate workflow YAML parsing and add coverage to CI-2
tasks.prompt: Remove the 'Validate workflow YAML syntax' job from `.github/workflows/ci-2-analyst-diagnostics.yml` as it duplicates `test_workflow_yaml_syntax.py`. Update `tests/kb/test_ci2_workflow.py` to match the new workflow content. Update `.github/workflows/ci-2-analyst-diagnostics.yml` to measure performance via `time` for key steps. Add python coverage reporting `pip install coverage && python3 -m coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' && python3 -m coverage report --fail-under=90`. Add missing `verification-matrix` stubs in `tests/kb/test_unit_verification_matrix.py`.

tasks.title: Batch CI-3 ingest and replace GITHUB_OUTPUT handoff
tasks.prompt: Modify `.github/workflows/ci-3-pr-producer.yml`. 1) Stop passing full source lists through GITHUB_OUTPUT. Instead, write to a manifest file like `sources.txt` and pass it to `--sources-manifest`. 2) Eliminate the `rm -f wiki/.kb_write.lock` step. 3) Move the `environment: name: ci3-manual-approval` into the `preflight` job if manual approval is needed, to enforce controls properly. Update `tests/kb/test_ci3_workflow.py` to assert the new behaviors.

tasks.title: Harden write paths against symlink traversal
tasks.prompt: In `scripts/kb/write_utils.py`, add `safe_write(path: Path, content: str, repo_root: Path)` and `safe_move(src: Path, dest: Path, repo_root: Path)`. They must call `path.resolve(strict=False)` and verify `is_relative_to(repo_root)`. Check parent paths for symlinks escaping the repo. Update `scripts/kb/ingest.py` to use these helpers instead of direct `.write_text()` or `.replace()`. Ensure tests in `test_ingest.py` and `test_regression_verification_matrix.py` validate this. Also: In `scripts/kb/ingest.py`, replace `_FIXED_GIT_SHA` with a function that retrieves the real SHA via `os.environ.get('GITHUB_SHA')` or falling back to `subprocess.run(['git', 'rev-parse', 'HEAD'])`. Fail closed if neither is available. Also: Update `raw/processed/SPEC.md` and `docs/architecture.md`. Remove claims that ingest updates `wiki/entities/` and `wiki/concepts/`. It only writes `wiki/sources/` pages.
